marketing.subtitle: Allowance, chores, and savings goals — simple and clear. For the whole family.
marketing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to your family finance system.
marketing.step1Desc: Create your account and add your children. Each child gets their own PIN for the kiosk.
marketing.step2Desc: Set up automatic allowance and create chores with rewards.
marketing.step3Desc: At the retro kiosk, kids see their balance, complete chores, and set savings goals.
marketing.featuresSubtitle: A complete system for allowance, chores, and savings goals.
marketing.featureAllowanceDesc: Set it up once and forget it. Allowance is credited weekly or monthly automatically — no manual transfers needed.
marketing.featureChoresDesc: You define chores with a reward. Once your child completes one and you approve it, the money is credited automatically.
marketing.featureSavingsDesc: Kids can set a goal — like a toy or game — and see every day how close they are to reaching it.
marketing.featureKioskDesc: Kids log in with their PIN and see their balance, open chores, and savings goals — in a fun retro design they'll love.
marketing.featureExportDesc: Export all transactions as a spreadsheet — handy when you need a quick overview.
marketing.featureSecurityDesc: Each child has their own account with a personal PIN. Kids only see their own balance.
marketing.parentBenefit1: No more manual transfers — allowance runs automatically
marketing.parentBenefit2: Always in view: what was booked, when and why
marketing.parentBenefit3: Kids learn through chores that money is earned
marketing.parentBenefit4: Full control — you decide what gets credited
marketing.kidBenefit1: Your own account — that feels real
marketing.kidBenefit2: Savings goals keep you motivated: how close am I?
marketing.kidBenefit3: Complete chores and earn real money
marketing.kidBenefit4: Learn how money works in a fun way
marketing.whySubtitle: We believe kids should learn about money early.
marketing.whyOpenSourceDesc: Fully open source. No hidden costs, no data collection.
marketing.whyNoRealMoneyDesc: Taschenkonto only manages numbers. You keep full control over real money.
marketing.whyPrivacyDesc: Self-hosted option available. Your data stays with you.
marketing.bottomCtaSubtitle: Create your account in seconds — free and no credit card required.
marketing.footerTagline: The Open-Source Family Pocket Money System

auth.loginSubtitle: We'll send you a login link via email.
auth.loginError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.checkEmailDetail: We sent a login link to {email}.
auth.newUser: No account yet? Just enter your email — we'll set everything up automatically.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.revertConfirm: Do you really want to revert this transaction? A counter-entry will be created.

children.name: Name
children.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure? All data (transactions, saving goals, investments) will be permanently deleted.

chores.title: Chores
chores.deleteChoreConfirm: Really delete this chore? All assignments will be removed.

investments.title: Investments
investments.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw {amount} from this investment back to your balance?
investments.festgeldLocked: Fixed-term deposits can only be withdrawn after maturity.
investments.festgeldDesc: Locked for a set period, higher interest rate
investments.kioskEnabledDesc: Children can create investments from the kiosk
investments.compoundInterestDesc: Interest is calculated monthly and added to your investment. This means you earn interest on your interest too!
investments.withdrawalConfirm: Are you sure you want to withdraw?
investments.withdrawalRequested: Withdrawal requested. A parent must approve.

settings.title: Settings
settings.kioskInvestmentsDesc: Children can create investments from the kiosk

setup.title: Welcome to Taschenkonto!
setup.subtitle: Set up your family in a few easy steps.

kiosk.interestExplainer: Every month you earn interest. The interest earns interest too — that's compound interest!
